productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Canvas Beige Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 28 cmWidth: 35 cmDepth: 18 cmMade of canvas fabric for durabilityHas one zippered compartment, two inner zippers and organiser sleeve for a mobile and essentialsMain compartment has two clasp buttons flap closureTwo short straps and a long adjustable and removable strap for carrying ease and styleBrand name appliqué d on the front One zippered pocket on the front for additional space      CareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
